  "findings": [
    "Wrong breaker type installed — breaker is not listed for the panelboard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace breaker with one listed for the specific panelboard per manufacturer instructions and NEC 110.3(B).",
    "Verify breaker interrupting rating meets available fault current at panel per NEC 110.9.",
    "Re-check terminations for correct temperature rating per NEC 110.14(C)."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 110.3(B) requires equipment to be installed per its listing and labeling. A breaker type not listed for the panelboard violates this, creating a high risk of poor connection, overheating, and potential fire hazard. The condition is non-compliant and must be corrected before energizing.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 110.3(B) — Listing and Labeling",
    "NEC 110.9 — Interrupting Rating",
    "NEC 110.14(C) — Temperature Limitations",
    "NEC 240 — Overcurrent Protection",
    "NEC 210.8 / 210.12 — GFCI / AFCI requirements (if breaker type affects required protection)"
  ]
}
